title: ADHD Default Overlay
description:
A Minecraft Resource pack made for Vanilla PvP (Crystal PvP)
This is a Default Pack with JUST the essentials
body:
# **ADHD Default Overlay**

**_This pack is a Default Overlay for Vanilla PvP (Crystal PvP)_**

<details>
<summary>Pack Features</summary>

- _Small Totem Pop_
- _Small Totem_
- _Smaller Util_
- _Low Fire_
- _No Explosion Particles_
- _Darker UI_
- _Old Enchant Glint_

**& More**

</details>
